creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
Not for me:

[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 /usr/ports/net/openntpd]$ sudo make clean
===>  Cleaning for openntpd-6.0p1_1,2
[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 /usr/ports/net/openntpd]$ sudo make
===> Options unchanged
===>  License ISCL accepted by the user
===>   openntpd-6.0p1_1,2 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by openntpd-6.0p1_1,2 for building
===>  Extracting for openntpd-6.0p1_1,2
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for openntpd-6.0p1.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for openntpd-6.0p1_1,2
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for openntpd-6.0p1_1,2
===>   openntpd-6.0p1_1,2 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.37 - not found
===> Options unchanged

===>  libressl-2.3.6 conflicts with installed package(s):
      libressl-devel-2.4.1

      They install files into the same place.
      You may want to stop build with Ctrl + C.
^C
[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 /usr/ports/net/openntpd]$ uname -a
FreeBSD BSDHelmut1064.charlieroot.de 10.3-RELEASE-p4 FreeBSD 10.3-RELEASE-p4 #0: Sat May 28 12:23:44 UTC 2016     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 /usr/ports/net/openntpd]$ pkg info -ix ssl
libressl-devel-2.4.1
p5-Crypt-OpenSSL-Bignum-0.06
p5-Crypt-OpenSSL-RSA-0.28_1
p5-Crypt-OpenSSL-Random-0.11
p5-IO-Socket-SSL-2.027
p5-Net-SSLeay-1.74
php56-openssl-5.6.22
vsftpd-ssl-3.0.3
[helmut@BSDHelmut1064 /usr/ports/net/openntpd]$
